actions.rationale: Integrity scan over manifests + integrity files at workspace root.
Workspace is inside the synced tree. Move source out; cache-managed subtrees (if any) must be excluded from the move and regenerated via `clain plan recreate` against the new location.
commands: rsync -a --delete --exclude .cache --exclude .mypy_cache --exclude .next --exclude .pytest_cache --exclude .ruff_cache --exclude .venv --exclude __pycache__ --exclude build --exclude dist --exclude node_modules --exclude site-packages --exclude venv '/example/dev/example-frontend'/ '/example/local-dev/example-frontend'/

actions.rationale: Integrity scan over manifests + integrity files at workspace root.
preconditions: venv directories embed absolute paths in pyvenv.cfg and console scripts — delete-and-recreate via `clain plan recreate`, do not move.
